description: Full admin panel with bug report triage, user management, AI usage monitoring, platform analytics, and system health

userStories.title: Admin Constants & Error Messages
userStories.description: As a developer, I want shared constants for the admin panel so nothing is hardcoded in UI components or routers.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/constants/admin.ts with: admin nav items array, bug report status/severity/category label maps, role labels, table page sizes
Add admin error messages to src/lib/constants/errors.ts: ERR_ADMIN_FORBIDDEN, ERR_ADMIN_USER_NOT_FOUND, ERR_ADMIN_INVALID_STATUS_TRANSITION
Export all constants with clear naming (ADMIN_NAV_ITEMS, BUG_REPORT_STATUS_LABELS, etc.)

userStories.title: Admin Procedure Middleware
userStories.description: As a developer, I want an adminProcedure tRPC middleware so that all admin endpoints enforce role-based access.
acceptanceCriteria: Create adminProcedure in src/server/api/trpc.ts that extends protectedProcedure
Middleware checks ctx.user.role === 'admin', throws FORBIDDEN TRPCError with ERR_ADMIN_FORBIDDEN message if not

userStories.title: Admin Platform Stats Endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a tRPC endpoint returning platform summary stats for the admin overview dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: Returns: totalUsers, activeUsersLast7d, totalTrades, openBugReports, aiConversationsLast7d, totalTokensUsed
Active users = users with trades or AI conversations in last 7 days

userStories.title: Integration Tests for Admin Middleware & Platform Stats
userStories.description: As a developer, I want integration tests for the admin middleware and platform stats endpoint.
acceptanceCriteria: Test: non-admin user gets FORBIDDEN on admin endpoints
Test: admin user can access platform stats
Test: platform stats returns correct counts
Uses setupTrader() fixtures, manually set role to admin for admin user

userStories.title: Admin Bug Reports Backend — List & Update Endpoints
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tRPC endpoints to list and update bug reports for admin triage.
acceptanceCriteria: Create admin.bugReports.list query — returns all bug reports with user info, supports filtering by status/category/severity, pagination (cursor-based or offset), sorted by newest first
Create admin.bugReports.updateStatus mutation — updates bug report status (open → in_progress → resolved → closed)
Create admin.bugReports.getById query — returns single bug report with full details

userStories.title: Integration Tests for Admin Bug Reports Endpoints
userStories.description: As a developer, I want integration tests for admin bug report management endpoints.
acceptanceCriteria: Test: list returns bug reports with user info

userStories.title: Admin Users Backend — List & Management Endpoints
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tRPC endpoints to list users and update their roles.
acceptanceCriteria: Create admin.users.list query — returns all users with account count, trade count, last active date, role; supports search by name/email, pagination
Create admin.users.getById query — returns single user with full details: accounts, recent trades (last 10), AI conversation count, bug report count
Create admin.users.updateRole mutation — updates user role (user ↔ admin)

userStories.title: Integration Tests for Admin Users Endpoints
userStories.description: As a developer, I want integration tests for admin user management endpoints.
acceptanceCriteria: Test: list returns users with counts
Test: getById returns full user details

userStories.title: Admin AI Usage Backend — Chat & Report Endpoints
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tRPC endpoints to view AI usage across all users.
acceptanceCriteria: Create admin.ai.listConversations query — returns all AI conversations with user info, token count, message count, mode (chat/report), status; supports filtering by mode/status, pagination, sorted newest first
Create admin.ai.getConversation query — returns single conversation with all messages
Create admin.ai.usageStats query — returns total tokens used, tokens by model, conversations by mode, daily usage for last 30 days

userStories.title: Integration Tests for Admin AI Endpoints
userStories.description: As a developer, I want integration tests for admin AI usage endpoints.
acceptanceCriteria: Test: listConversations returns conversations with user info
Test: filter by mode (chat vs report) works

userStories.title: Admin Platform Analytics Backend
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tRPC endpoints for platform-wide analytics.
acceptanceCriteria: Create admin.analytics.growth query — returns daily new users and cumulative total for last 30 days
Create admin.analytics.tradingActivity query — returns daily trade count, total P&L, avg trade size for last 30 days
Create admin.analytics.topTraders query — returns top 10 users by total P&L with name, email, trade count, total P&L
Create admin.analytics.accountBreakdown query — returns count of accounts by type (demo, live, prop_challenge, prop_funded)

userStories.title: Integration Tests for Admin Analytics Endpoints
userStories.description: As a developer, I want integration tests for admin platform analytics endpoints.
acceptanceCriteria: Test: growth returns daily user counts
Test: tradingActivity returns daily trade data
Test: accountBreakdown returns correct counts per type

userStories.title: Admin System Health Backend
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a tRPC endpoint for system health metrics.
acceptanceCriteria: Returns: database row counts (users, trades, accounts, aiConversations, aiMessages, bugReports), database connection status (simple query), app version (from package.json), last user signup date, last trade date, last AI conversation date

userStories.title: Integration Tests for Admin System Health Endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I want integration tests for the admin system health endpoint.
acceptanceCriteria: Test: health endpoint returns all expected fields

userStories.title: Admin Route Group & Layout
userStories.description: As an admin, I want a dedicated admin layout with sidebar navigation so that I can access all admin panels.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin sidebar with navigation items imported from ADMIN_NAV_ITEMS constant
Terminal design system: dark theme, chartreuse accents, monospace labels
Back to App link to return to normal dashboard
Layout rejects non-admin users (redirect to /dashboard or show unauthorized)

userStories.title: Admin Middleware Guard on Routes
userStories.description: As a developer, I want Next.js middleware or client-side guard to protect admin routes so non-admins can't access admin pages.
acceptanceCriteria: Update existing middleware or add client-side guard in admin layout
Non-admin users accessing /admin/* are redirected to /dashboard
Admin layout fetches user role and gates rendering
Verify in browser: non-admin user redirected, admin user sees panel

userStories.title: Admin Navigation Link in Main Sidebar
userStories.description: As an admin, I want a link to the admin panel in the main app sidebar so that I can quickly access it.
acceptanceCriteria: Conditionally show Admin nav item in app-sidebar.tsx when user role is admin
Use a distinct icon (e.g., Shield or Settings2)
Create tRPC query or use existing user data to check role on client

userStories.title: Admin Overview Dashboard Page
userStories.description: As an admin, I want a dashboard overview page showing key platform metrics at a glance.
acceptanceCriteria: Cards: Total Users, Active Users (last 7 days), Total Trades, Open Bug Reports, AI Conversations (last 7 days), Total AI Tokens Used
Each card links to its detailed panel
Terminal design: monospace numbers, chartreuse highlights for key metrics

userStories.title: Bug Reports Admin Page — List View
userStories.description: As an admin, I want a bug reports page to triage and manage reported issues.
acceptanceCriteria: Table view: title, category, severity, status, reporter (name/email), date
Filters: status dropdown, category dropdown, severity dropdown
Severity badges with colors (critical=red, high=orange, medium=yellow, low=gray)
Status badges with colors (open=red, in_progress=yellow, resolved=green, closed=gray)
Click row to expand/view full details (description, screenshot, page URL, user agent, metadata)
Terminal design: monospace table, data-dense layout

userStories.title: Users Admin Page — List View
userStories.description: As an admin, I want a users page to view and manage all platform users.
acceptanceCriteria: Table: name, email, role, accounts count, trades count, joined date, last active
Click row to navigate to user detail page

userStories.title: User Detail Admin Page
userStories.description: As an admin, I want a user detail page to see a specific user's full activity.
acceptanceCriteria: Header: user name, email, avatar, role, joined date
Role toggle button (promote to admin / demote to user) with confirmation dialog
Sections: Accounts list, Recent Trades (last 10 with P&L), AI Conversations summary, Bug Reports by this user
Each section shows count and brief data

userStories.title: AI Usage Admin Page
userStories.description: As an admin, I want an AI usage page to monitor conversations, reports, and token consumption.
acceptanceCriteria: Top stats: total conversations, total reports, total tokens, avg tokens per conversation
Token usage chart (daily for last 30 days) — simple bar/line chart
Conversations table: user, title, mode (chat/report), status, messages count, tokens, date
Click conversation to expand and view messages inline
Terminal design: ice blue (#00d4ff) accent for AI section

userStories.title: Platform Analytics Admin Page
userStories.description: As an admin, I want a platform analytics page with growth and trading activity charts.
acceptanceCriteria: User growth chart (daily new + cumulative line)
Account type breakdown (pie/donut or bar chart)
Use recharts or simple SVG charts consistent with existing analytics page
Terminal design: chartreuse for positive metrics, red for losses

userStories.title: System Health Admin Page
userStories.description: As an admin, I want a system health page showing database stats and system status.
acceptanceCriteria: Table counts: rows per table displayed as stat cards
Last activity timestamps: last signup, last trade, last AI conversation
Terminal design: green for healthy, red for issues
